ideation: This animation sequence shows the robot mimicking the action of cleaning with a sponge.  The movement will focus on a scrubbing motion, using both arms in a coordinated way. The sequence will start with the arms extended, then move into a scrubbing motion, and finally return to a neutral position.  The robot doesn't actually *hold* a sponge, but we'll simulate the action.

frames.beat: arms extend slightly, ready to scrub
both arms scrub side to side with wrist twists
arms return to a neutral, clean pose
